input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.5.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.5.1.1
            TITLE: the organizer may alter the conduct and scoring of the competition based on weather

            CONTENT:
            rule D.5.1.1: The organizer may alter the conduct and scoring of the competition based on weather
D.5.1.1 The organizer may alter the conduct and scoring of the competition based on weather 
conditions.

final_answer: The organizer may alter the conduct and scoring of the competition based on weather conditions.
